title: MMi Daily Iron Ore Index Report March 29 2024
section_path: MMi Daily Iron Ore Index Report March 29 2024
section_path_text: MMi Daily Iron Ore Index Report March 29 2024
summary:
Main
in Chinese iron ore and steelmaking prices 29/03/2024
DCE iron ore futures opened high and fell, breaking the previous low and reaching 737 points. The main contract I2409,closed at 740,an decrease of 2.44% throughout the day; Traders ship according to market conditions, adopt separate quotations. Some steel mills tended to be wait-and-see, and purchased on demand.
